description:
The enterprise Information Security team has mandated a transition from insecure SNMPv2c to FIPS-compliant SNMPv3 for all network infrastructure monitoring. You must configure ManageEngine OpManager to support this new policy by creating three highly secure SNMPv3 credential profiles.

Read the security policy document located at `~/Desktop/snmpv3_migration_policy.txt` to identify the required credentials, context names, cryptographic algorithms, and passphrases.

Then, log in to ManageEngine OpManager at `http://localhost:8060` (credentials: `admin` / `Admin@123`) and navigate to the Credentials configuration area (typically under Settings -> Discovery -> Credentials). Create all three SNMPv3 profiles exactly as specified in the policy document. Ensure you select 'v3' as the version so the advanced cryptographic fields become available.

All credentials must be saved successfully to the system.
